channel.title: AI+Database Research Podcast
channel.description: A podcast series exploring the intersection of AI and Database systems — surveys, benchmarks, frontier paradigms, and open research questions. Generated from academic papers using NotebookLM, curated for PhD students and researchers entering the field.
channel.itunes:author: Xinyang Zhang
channel.itunes:summary: A podcast series exploring the intersection of AI and Database systems — surveys, benchmarks, frontier paradigms, and open research questions. Curated for PhD students and researchers entering the field.

item.title: Phase 1: Autonomous Databases and the LLM Frontier
item.description: An introductory overview of the AI+Database research field for a first-year PhD student. Covers: AI4DB vs DB4AI, major research lines including text-to-SQL, learned database components, AI-native data systems, data agents, and LLM+data integration. Based on three foundational survey papers: "AI Meets Database" (Li et al., SIGMOD 2021), "Database Meets AI" (Zhou et al., 2021), and "A Survey of LLM x DATA" (Zhou et al., 2025).
item.itunes:summary: An introductory overview of the AI+Database research field. Covers AI4DB vs DB4AI, major research lines, and open questions from three foundational survey papers.
